title: pityrogramma schizophylla
intro: Pityrogramma schizophylla, also known as the umbrella fern or umbrella plant, is a species of fern in the family Marattiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Pityrogramma schizophylla is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
